calendar.matters:
Minor'S Compromise In Scd 218
Off Calendar Nov-25-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Appearances:
Jennifer K. Berg, Esq. for Petitioner: Fred Veevalu present as guardian ad litem for Josephine Enriquez, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petion is granted and the compromise is approved.
Total allowance for fees and expenses of $12,936.52
A net balance of $24,120.08 to be deposited into a blocked account with
American River Healthpro Credit Union, 12519 Folsom Blvd., Rancho Cordova, CA. until minor's reaches the age of 18. It is ordered that future settlements from other defendants in this action, as may be recommended by counsel (including bankruptcy or class claims) may be accepted by petitioner, acting on behalf of Josephine Enriquez. See scanned ordered.
Order signed in court.
